const member = db.prepare('SELECT id, status FROM members WHERE id = ?').get(input.memberId) as { id: string; status: string } | undefined;
parsed.anchor_rejected_above: Level 4 requires (a) services depending on a thin DB-access abstraction rather than raw db.prepare — but loanService.ts is full of inline raw SQL like `db.prepare('SELECT id, status FROM members WHERE id = ?').get(...)`; (b) frontend organized by feature — but frontend uses technical-role folders (`components/`, `pages/`, single `api.ts`) with no `checkout/`, `members/`, `books/` feature directories; (c) shared types in a single source — backend has its own `types.ts` and frontend has its own types in `api.ts` with no shared package or generated client. Multiple level-4 conditions fail.
